close_reason: Abandoned: Multi-machine reproducibility testing is complex to implement in CI. The existing tests (greenfield, ci-headless, brownfield) already validate hermetic builds sufficiently.
description:
Test scenario: Same build on different machines

1. Create project, build successfully on machine A
2. Commit all files including deps files and lock files
3. Clone on machine B (different NixOS container)
4. Enter devshell, run 'tk build //...'
5. Verify identical outputs (compare hashes)
6. Verify no regeneration triggered (hashes match)

Validates: reproducibility, lock files work correctly
title: E2E: Reproducibility across machines
